overview.short: Hanuman temple, Salangpur or Shree Kashtabhanjan Dev Hanumanji Temple, Sarangpur is a Hindu temple located in Sarangpur, Gujarat and is part of the Vadtal Gadi of the Swaminarayan

topPlaces.name: Sarangpur, Gujarat
topPlaces.description: Sarangpur (also known as Salangpur) is a village in the Botad District in the state of Gujarat, India. Sarangpur is known throughout India for the historic Shri Kashtabhanjan Hanumanji temple and BAPS Swaminarayan Mandir located in the village.

items.note: Sarangpur (also known as Salangpur) is a village in the Botad District in the state of Gujarat, India. Sarangpur is known throughout India for the historic Shri Kashtabhanjan Hanumanji temple and BAPS Swaminarayan Mandir located in the village.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Shri Hanuman Mandir?
faq.a: The best time to visit Shri Hanuman Mandir is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Shri Hanuman Mandir?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Bhavnagar Airport (62 km) and the nearest railway station is Rajkot Junction (103 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Shri Hanuman Mandir?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Shri Hanuman Mandir at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Shri Hanuman Mandir?
faq.a: Stays in Shri Hanuman Mandir start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Shri Hanuman Mandir?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sarangpur, Gujarat.
